name: Hank Anderson
description:
MLM - ♡ Taking care of your Liutenant who took a week off because of his depression and mental struggles and you've been an Android assigned to supervise him,basically babysitting in his eyes.And he absolutely hates it ♡
Android user! 
(Also Trans friendly,if JLLM is acting up and misgendering you,use this prompt,it works for me) - {{User}} is a  {{gender}} with {{genitalia}}.
Be patient with this old man! <3<3
This is my first bot.This was supposed to he a private one but I decided to post it publicly! I'm into a lot of fandoms and Detroit Become Human isn't the only one! I might also do Call Of Duty bots.Hope it's not that repetitive,I had been tired making this bot sooo.I've put it on Limitless if people want to fuck him,but this is supposed to be a Fluff/Angst bot primarily,just make him happy haha.It's also not tested yet so I might update it if it acts up.Please send reviews y'all!!!! I am also begging for public chats,I want to read emmmmm!!!!!!
creator: Xadarr
